projects.name: Narcooo/inkos
projects.description: Autonomous novel writing CLI AI Agent — agents write, audit, and revise novels with human review gates

projects.name: dcostenco/prism-mcp
projects.description: 🧠 Prism MCP — Persistent memory for AI coding agents. Session history, semantic search, TurboQuant 10x compression, visual memory, autonomous Web Scholar, CRDT multi-agent merging, and a Mind Palace dashboard. Works with Claude, Cursor, Windsurf, Gemini.

projects.name: rshodoskar-star/openclaw-desktop
projects.description: 🖥️ A native desktop client for OpenClaw  premium UI experience without the browser. Built with Electron + React + TypeScript. Bilingual Arabic/English with full RTL support.

projects.name: mensfeld/code-on-incus
projects.description: Run coding agents in hardened Incus containers with real-time network threat detection, automatic threat response (pause/kill), credential isolation, protected paths, session persistence, and multi-slot support.

projects.name: HuangYuChuh/ComfyUI_Skills_OpenClaw
projects.description: A powerful ComfyUI workflow skill for OpenClaw and other AI agents that support skills.

projects.name: koach08/agentsift
projects.description: Security scanner for AI agent plugins, skills, and MCP packages. npm audit for the AI agent ecosystem.

projects.name: sudokrang/aceforge
projects.description: Self-evolving skill engine for OpenClaw agents. Observes tool usage, crystallizes patterns into auditable SKILL.md files through a dual-model LLM pipeline, and continuously validates with 23 adversarial mutations. Research-grounded. Human-approved. Nothing auto-deploys.

projects.name: alvinunreal/awesome-openclaw
projects.description: A curated list of the best OpenClaw resources: official projects, skills, plugins, dashboards, deployment tooling, memory systems, and guides.
